item.title: Bitcoin, Fiat & Rock'n'Roll вАУ Saylor Sells and Transatlantic Money Showdown | Monthly Briefing
item.description:
In this BFRR monthly briefing episode, Michael Blaschke and Manuel Klein look back at a brutal June for crypto markets and a surprisingly active month for institutional DLT, stablecoins and digital money. Bitcoin and Ethereum both ended deep in the red, the total crypto market cap fell sharply, and the hosts ask whether the sell-off is a bear-market signal, a liquidity stress alarm, or evidence that capital is rotating toward AI. They also unpack Michael SaylorвАЩs symbolic sale of 32 Bitcoin, Jack MallersвАЩ вАЬsmoke alarmвАЭ thesis, BlackRockвАЩs $9 trillion cash-on-the-sidelines argument and Vitalik ButerinвАЩs push to make privacy a native Ethereum property.

The episode then moves from markets to infrastructure. StellarвАЩs strategic investment in Frankfurt-based Cashlink highlights how regulated tokenized securities infrastructure is becoming a scarce and valuable asset in Europe. Digital AssetвАЩs major funding round for Canton shows that banks, market infrastructures and crypto investors are converging around privacy-first networks for institutional adoption.

On the money side, stablecoins continue their march into mainstream finance. MoneyGram launches MGUSD on Stellar for remittances, ItalyвАЩs Bancomat prepares a bank-backed euro stablecoin, Mastercard expands stablecoin settlement for card transactions, and reports suggest Mastercard, Stripe, Visa and Coinbase may be exploring a new stablecoin platform. The Clearing HouseвАЩs tokenized deposit plans and the progress of mBridge add another layer to the race between private money, commercial bank money and central bank money.

Finally, the hosts examine the widening transatlantic divide in regulation. In Europe, the ECB, European Commission, EBA and Bank of England sharpen their frameworks around stablecoins, MiCA and public settlement money. In the United States, Congress moves against a retail CBDC while policymakers increasingly frame dollar stablecoins as a tool of monetary power. The episode closes with knowledge bites on stablecoin transaction data and a critical German debate on the digital euro.

Bitcoin, Fiat & RockвАЩnвАЩRoll Website

Bitcoin, Fiat & RockвАЩnвАЩRoll Telegram Channel

Knowledge Bite Michael: German Podcast Episode 385 of Daniel StelterвАЩs Beyond the Obvious: вАЬEinfach √Љberfl√Љssig: der digitale Euro"

Knowledge Bite Manuel: BIS Working Paper: Sch√§r et al., The anatomy of Stablecoin transactions

Relai*: Buy Bitcoin with RelaiвАФyou can do a one-time purchase or savings plan: Click here. Use the referral code "ROCK" to reduce transaction fees by 0.1% while supporting Bitcoin, Fiat & RockвАЩnвАЩRoll.

Value4Value Podcast Streaming: Support our podcast by listening to our episodes on the Fountain Podcast App. This way, if you wish, you can support us "Value4Value" while listening to the podcast. You can find us on the Fountain Podcast App here: Click here

Disclaimer: The content of this podcast reflects the private opinions of the hosts, serves exclusively for general information purposes and does not constitute investment advice. Always remember: Do your own researchвАФinform yourself before making any investment decisions, such as buying Bitcoin. First try to understand what Bitcoin is and how to store it. This podcast does not provide financial advice. Note that the co-hosts might be invested in crypto assets. Read more on our website: Click here

All links marked with "*" are affiliate links. If you use these links for purchase, the podcast receives a small share of the revenue without any additional costs to you. On the contrary, affiliate links often include discount promotions, so you can even save money. We would appreciate it if you use these links to support us. Thank you very much!

item.title: Coin Stories with Natalie Brunell вАУ The Best of Bitcoin: Highlights From Our Most-Watched Shows with Saylor, Macgregor, Webb, Booth
item.description:
Four of the biggest voices in Bitcoin вАФ Michael Saylor, Whitney Webb, Jeff Booth, and Col. Douglas Macgregor вАФ in one episode.

We went back through the most-watched, most-shared moments from the show and built them into a single story: what's broken with the money, why Bitcoin fixes it, and what you can actually do about it. In about 35 minutes you'll hear the clearest case for why the system feels rigged, why these four believe Bitcoin is the way out, and the one line Saylor leaves you with: Bitcoin will win вАФ but not everyone wins with it.

Topics:

  • Why Jeff Booth says we've never actually lived in a free market
  • Michael Saylor on why Bitcoin is "the best asset, with no second best"
  • How broken money quietly concentrates wealth at the very top
  • Whitney Webb on digital ID, programmable money, and how to opt out
  • Why no politician or billionaire is coming to save you
  • The mindset shift that turns doom into building something better

-----

Order Natalie's new book "Bitcoin is For Everyone," a simple introduction to Bitcoin and what's broken in our current financial system: https://amzn.to/3WzFzfU

---

----

With Ledn, you get custody loans, no credit checks, no monthly payments, and more. Get .25% off your first loan, learn more at https://www.Ledn.io/natalie

----

Abundant Mines is a fully-managed Bitcoin mining in the U.S. You own the miners. You keep 100% of the Bitcoin. Voted #1 mining company by peers. Get 1 month of free hosting: AbundantMines.com/Natalie

----

item.title: The Breakdown вАУ Binance Needs A Friend in The European Union
item.description:
Binance is out of the EU as of July 1 after its MICA license application in Greece was rejected. David runs through who is and isn't licensed under MICA, checks Blockworks Research for Binance's actual spot market share (~33%), and looks at whether the outflow data suggests real damage. Then: the US government is now effectively approving AI model releases вАФ Anthropic's Mythos 5 is live for a whitelist of 100+ orgs, Fable 5 still blocked, and OpenAI just did the same thing with GPT-V.Sol. David draws the parallel to how regulation changed crypto. Finally: Meta is building a prediction market app called Arena, with Zuck reportedly pursuing partnerships with Polymarket and Kaoshi. David checks Polymarket and Kaoshi's open interest data and asks whether Meta is just late to the party again.


TIMESTAMPS:

[To be filled in]


FOLLOW THE SHOW

вАЇ David вАФ https://x.com/dcanellis

вАЇ The Breakdown вАФ https://x.com/TheBreakdownBW

вАЇ The Breakdown Newsletter вАФ https://blockworks.com/newsletter/the-breakdown


DISCLAIMER

As always, remember this podcast is for informational purposes only, and any views expressed by anyone on the show are solely their opinions, not financial advice.


]]>

item.title: House of Satoshi - Bitcoin und Friends вАУ #60 Bitcoin als Lebenseinstellung - mit dem Bitcoin-Banker Pascal Eberle
item.description:
*** Werbung: PostFinance Krypto Newsletter ***

Der Krypto-Markt schl√§ft nie. Jede Woche passiert etwas Neues rund um Bitcoin, Ethereum und Co. Der monatliche Newsletter von PostFinance ordnet die wichtigsten Entwicklungen kompakt ein, damit du den √Ьberblick beh√§ltst, ohne lange zu suchen. Abonnieren direkt im E-Finance oder hier: Krypto-Newsletter abonnieren | PostFinance

https://www.postfinance.ch/de/privat/anlegen/moeglichkeiten/krypto/newsletter-abonnieren.html#/category?groupId=newsletter_krypto

***

Bitcoin als Lebenseinstellung, der Markt im Tief und die Bitcoinisierung der Finanzwelt

Rino Borini spricht mit Pascal Eberle, Chief of Staff bei Sygnum Bank und Co-Lead von Bitcoin at Sygnum, √Љber Proof of Work als Alltagsprinzip, das blutende Preisschild bei starkem Fundament und die Produktwelt einer Digital Asset Bank.

Die Kernthemen:

  • Bitcoin-Prinzipien wie tiefe Zeitpr√§ferenz und stay humble, stack sats wirken weit √Љber die Wallet hinaus, bis in Sport, Sparen und Familie.
  • Bei knapp 60'000 Dollar sieht der Preis schlecht aus, doch institutionelle Adoption und Netzwerksicherheit waren laut Eberle noch nie so stark.
  • Geld funktioniert in Schichten: Bitcoin ist der sichere Base Layer, Lightning erledigen den Alltag.
  • Von Verwahrung √Љber Transfer und Lending bis zu Bitcoin-Hypotheken: wie Banken die Bitcoinisierung umsetzen.

Im Talk erw√§hnt:

  • Nick Bhatia, Layered Money (Buch)
  • Jeff Booth, The Price of Tomorrow (Buch)
  • Douglas Adams, The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy (Buch)
  • Gigi, "Bitcoin is Time" (Essay, dergigi.com)

Abonniere den House of Satoshi Newsletter f√Љr monatliche Bitcoin-Insights. http://www.house-of-satoshi.ch/newsletter


--------------------------------

Disclaimer: Dieser Inhalt dient der Information und Bildung und ist keine Anlage-, Steuer- oder Rechtsberatung. Bitcoin und Krypto sind volatil, du kannst dein eingesetztes Kapital verlieren. Mach deine eigene Recherche und entscheide selbst.

item.title: Bitcoin Magazine Podcast вАУ Sen. Lummis: America's Debt is the BTC Bull Thesis, & Why Clarity is Key to US Financial Dominance
item.description:
With U.S. debt now exceeding 100% of GDP, Senator Cynthia Lummis argues the country can't afford to ignore Bitcoin. In this Bitcoin Magazine podcast conversation with host Spencer Nichols, she lays out why a strategic Bitcoin reserve could be America's "Louisiana Purchase moment" and how holding it long term might meaningfully reduce the national debt. She also breaks down the Clarity Act timeline and the legislation racing through Congress.


рЯФґ Spencer Nichols вАФ Bitcoin Magazine

рЯФґ Senator Cynthia Lummis вАФ U.S. Senator for Wyoming


Chapters:

2:09 вАУ Why U.S. Debt Now Exceeds 100% of GDP3:30 вАУ How the Genius Act Drives Treasury Demand4:50 вАУ Could 5% of the World's Bitcoin Cut the Debt?5:41 вАУ The BITCOIN Act vs. Begich's House Reserve Bill8:04 вАУ Clarity Act Timeline: A Senate Vote Before August?10:06 вАУ Singapore, Switzerland, and the Race to Lead13:04 вАУ Lummis on Her Bitcoin and Life After the Senate14:20 вАУ The Legacy of "A Spark" and a Call to Advocates


#Bitcoin #CynthiaLummis #SenatorLummis #BitcoinMagazine #ClarityAct #BitcoinAct #StrategicBitcoinReserve #BitcoinReserve #NickBegich #ARMA #GeniusAct #Stablecoins #USTreasuries #NationalDebt #BitcoinRegulation #DigitalAssets #BitcoinPolicy #Wyoming #CryptoRegulation #BTC #HODL #BitcoinNews #USPolicy #FinancialFreedom


DISCLAIMER: The views and opinions expressed in this show are those of the participants and do not necessarily reflect the official policy or position of BTC Inc., Bitcoin Magazine, or any affiliated entities. This content is provided for informational and educational purposes only and should not be construed as investment, legal, tax, or accounting advice. Nothing contained in this show constitutes a solicitation, recommendation, endorsement, or offer to buy or sell any securities or financial instruments. Viewers should consult their own advisors before making financial or business decisions.

item.title: THE Bitcoin Podcast вАУ вАЬI WAS WRONGвАЭ: Bitcoin, Nostr, AI & The Reality of Freedom Tech Adoption | Matt Odell
item.description:
In this episode, I sit down with Matt Odell for a wide-ranging conversation on the state of Bitcoin, Nostr, and freedom tech in an era of accelerating AI surveillance. Matt opens up about why he returned to X after two years on Nostr only, what he got wrong about adoption timelines, and why he still believes open protocols are the only credible path forward. We get into the tension between self-custody and custodial convenience, the surveillance threat posed by AI-powered data harvesting, and how Odell thinks about building resilient, censorship-resistant systems from his own self-hosted stack at home.

item.title: Crypto Nerds Podcast - Krypto, Bitcoin, Web3 & Co. вАУ Uncut | Blutroter Markt und Binance zieht sich zur√Љck. Mit dem Steuerexperten Werner Hoffmann
item.description:
Diese Episode wird wie immer unterst√Љtzt von unserem Partner und Krypto-Broker Bison https://bit.ly/cryptonerds-bison

10 Euro BISON Gutschein (Code: BITCOIN10): https://bisonapp.com/gutschein/podcast

Jetzt Early Access sichern - Crypto Nerds Trading Lab

Lerne Trading, teste Strategien mit Demogeld und nimm an Wettbewerben teil, komplett risikofrei. Jetzt kostenlos registrieren: https://tradinglab.cryptonerds.com/

Einordnung & √Ьberblick

Sascha ist diese Woche Vater geworden, herzlichen Gl√Љckwunsch an die Familie R√ґhrer. Werner springt als Gast ein. Der Markt hat keine Pause eingelegt: Bitcoin auf 20-Monatstief, Binance verl√§sst Europa und die Krypto-Branche schrumpft sich. Eric und Werner analysieren alles n√Љchtern.

Themen dieser Woche

вАҐ Aufl√ґsung der Wette: Eric n√§her dran mit 60.500 Dollar, Sascha lag weiter weg

вАҐ Bitcoin auf 20-Monatstief bei 58.400 Dollar

вАҐ Bitcoin minus 4% in 7 Tagen, Ethereum und XRP je minus 8%

вАҐ Fear and Greed Index bei 16: tief im Bereich extremer Angst

вАҐ 7 Wochen in Folge Bitcoin-ETF-Outflows, knapp 6 Milliarden in 30 Tagen

вАҐ 460 Millionen Outflow am Dienstag, 690 Millionen am Mittwoch

вАҐ Long-Liquidationen von 400 Millionen in 24 Stunden

вАҐ Nasdaq verliert 1000 Punkte in 27 Minuten

вАҐ Overall Realized Price aller Bitcoin bei 53.000 Dollar

вАҐ Short-Term-Holder-Linie √Љber dem aktuellen Kurs: B√§renmarktsignal

вАҐ B√§renmarkt im 8. Monat: keine Sch√ґnrederei mehr m√ґglich

вАҐ Zwei Szenarien: Boden bei 60.000 oder Abw√§rtsspirale Richtung 40.000

вАҐ Strategy: 3.550 Bitcoin nachgekauft nach erstem Verkauf

вАҐ MicroStrategy-Aktie weiter unter Druck, Refinanzierungsrisiko steigt

вАҐ Eric: Strategy ist systemrelevant wenn Kurs auf 45 bis 40k f√§llt

вАҐ Werner: auch DeFi-Protokolle und f√§llige Anleihen als potenzielle Verk√§ufer

вАҐ Binance best√§tigt: MiCA-Lizenzantrag in Griechenland zur√Љckgezogen

вАҐ Ab 1. Juli: keine Neukundenwerbung und keine aktiven Services f√Љr EU-B√Љrger

вАҐ Was mit Bestandskunden passiert ist noch nicht abschlie√Яend gekl√§rt

вАҐ Werner erkl√§rt: R√Љckzug ist rechtlich anders als Ablehnung

вАҐ M√ґglicher n√§chster Schritt: Binance bewirbt sich in anderem EU-Land

вАҐ Eric: Kunden meldeten Probleme beim Funds-Abziehen wegen ID-Aktualisierung

вАҐ Empfehlung f√Љr unsichere User: Bison, Bitwavo, Bitpanda, Coinbase, Kraken, OKX

вАҐ Ethereum Foundation k√Љrzt Budget 40 Prozent, entl√§sst 20 Prozent der Mitarbeiter

вАҐ Bitgo entl√§sst 15 Prozent des Teams

вАҐ Krypto-Jobs: Standards steigen, Konkurrenz w√§chst

вАҐ Predict Street: offizieller FIFA-WM-Sponsor, Prediction Market auf Fu√Яball

вАҐ Wette der Woche: Bitcoin-Kurs n√§chste Woche, Werner 60.000, Eric 57.500

вАҐ WM-Achtelfinale: Eric 2:1, Werner rein statistisch 1:0 f√Љr Deutschland

Moderation

Eric Heinemann вАУ @cryptonerds

Werner (Gast diese Woche)

Community & Links

item.title: bitcoin ist - Wissen statt FOMO вАУ 18) ... Deflation f√Љr alle
item.description:
Warum schlagen √Цkonomen und Zentralbanken sofort Alarm, wenn sie das Wort вАЮDeflationвАЬ h√ґren? Sie warnen vor Wirtschaftskrisen, hoher Arbeitslosigkeit und dem Zusammenbruch der M√§rkte. Und in unserem aktuellen Finanzsystem haben sie damit sogar recht вАУ allerdings tun sie damit dem Begriff der Deflation unrecht.

In dieser Folge von вАЮbitcoin ist...вАЬ schauen wir uns den Begriff der Deflation genauer an. Denn es gibt zwei Arten von Deflation: Eine, die ein krankes System kollabieren l√§sst, und eine, die der absolute Normalzustand der menschlichen Zivilisation sein sollte.

  • Der "Fehler" im System: Warum unser schuldenbasiertes Geldsystem Angst vor sinkenden Preisen hat und warum Kredite niemals вАЮteurerвАЬ werden d√Љrfen.

  • Die gute Deflation: Wie der technologische Fortschritt (vom Rad bis zum Internet) unser Leben nat√Љrlicherweise immer effizienter und g√Љnstiger machen m√Љsste.

  • Das 2%-Mantra: Warum Zentralbanken die Geldmenge k√Љnstlich ausweiten, um den Produktivit√§tsgewinn deiner Lebenszeit unbemerkt abzusch√ґpfen.

  • Bitcoin als L√ґsung: Wie eine absolut begrenzte Geldmenge von 21 Millionen Einheiten daf√Љr sorgt, dass der menschliche Fortschritt endlich wieder direkt in deinem Geldbeutel landet.

вАЮDie Zentralbanken bek√§mpfen die schlechte Deflation, indem sie permanent Geld drucken. Doch damit zerst√ґren sie gleichzeitig die gute Deflation вАУ sie fressen den technologischen Fortschritt einfach auf und verw√§ssern unsere Kaufkraft schleichend.вАЬ

Alles von "bitcoin ist..." Hier geht es zu allen meinen Kan√§len: https://linktr.ee/bitcoinist

Einsteiger-Spezial: m√ґchtest du wissen, WIE man bitcoin sicher kauft und verwahrt? kostenlose und sichere Kaufanleitung direkt in dein Postfach

Hinterlasse mir gerne eine 5-Sterne-Bewertung oder einen Kommentar. Danke, Dein Christian.


]]>

item.description:

https://www.thebitcoinway.com/services/bitcoin-self-custody-training?utm_source=tbw&utm_medium=fountain&utm_campaign=bitcoin-banter&utm_content=desc

рЯУЦ Subscribe to our newsletter: https://www.thebitcoinway.com/resources/newsletter?utm_source=tbw&utm_medium=fountain&utm_campaign=bitcoin-banter&utm_content=desc

вАФ------------------------

At BTC Prague, Tony Yazbeck took the stage immediately after Michael Saylor вАФ and the contrast couldn't have been more striking. In this week's Bitcoin Banter, Michael, Tony, and Katie break down Tony's personal keynote, the temperature in the room, and their biggest takeaways from the conference. The team also issues an urgent warning about a sophisticated phishing scam targeting CoinKite customers with fake letters about quantum cryptography updates.

The episode also covers fake Sparrow Wallet apps that have been stealing Bitcoin from App Store users, twin July 1st regulatory deadlines вАФ Australia's travel rule attaching identity data to self-custody withdrawals, and the EU's MiCA rules set to knock out 80% of exchanges serving European customers. And finally, a freshly resigned leader earns himself our Donkey of the Week.

вАФ------------------------

вП±пЄП TIMESTAMPS:

0:00 Intro вАУ BTC Prague Recap

2:04 Saylor vs Tony: Two Very Different Bitcoin Speeches

9:00 Warning: CoinKite Phishing Scam

17:37 Fake Sparrow Wallet Apps in the App Store

21:40 Australia Travel Rule & the July 1st Deadline

29:20 EU MiCA Rules: Get Off Exchanges Now

32:31 Donkey of the Week

вАФ------------------------

item.title: The Bitcoin Treasury Podcast вАУ If You're Bearish On Strategy You're Actually Bearish On Bitcoin вАФ Here's Why
item.description:
Sam Callahan, Nick Payton, and Alexandre Laizet join Tyler Rowe to break down why STRC at $84 is a 13.7% yield opportunity, what caused the cascading peg breach, and why being bearish on Strategy means being bearish on Bitcoin.

*In this episode:*
вЬЕ Why STRC at $84 represents a 13.7% effective yield вАФ and Sam Callahan's case for why the numbers say it recovers

вЬЕ The cascading liquidation event explained вАФ leveraged carry trades in traditional finance, not DeFi, hit the same level and broke the peg in a cascade from 90 to 82

вЬЕ Why Strategy retiring convertible debt actually improved credit quality вАФ and why the market got it backwards

вЬЕ If you're bearish on Strategy, you're bearish on Bitcoin over the next five to ten years вАФ Sam Callahan makes the case

вЬЕ Three buckets for Bitcoin investors вАФ self-custody Bitcoin, digital equity (MSTR), digital credit (STRC/SATA) вАФ and who each is for

вЬЕ Alexandre's framework: Strike offers Bitcoin-backed loans, Strategy issues digital credit вАФ different sides of the same trade

вЬЕ Odell's tweet вАФ "never put yourself in a position where you need Bitcoin price to go up in the short term" вАФ and why four analysts think that's exactly what Strategy has avoided

вЬЕ BitGo hits Fortune 500 at #273 вАФ and how the inventor of Bitcoin's 2-of-3 multisig became the first infrastructure play to go public

вЬЕ Orange BTC's World Cup campaign вАФ buying 1 Bitcoin for every Brazil goal

*TIMESTAMPS:*
00:00 Cold Open
01:58 Navigating BTC / MSTR Bear Market
02:34 STRC, SATA Digital Credit Price Shocks
18:29 Market (Over)Reactions To Strategy
20:24 The Role of Investor Relations
28:37 Durable Bitcoin Treasury Strategies
39:02 Bitcoiner Criticism of Treasuries
59:52 Competition vs. Collaboration in BTC
1:06:57 Expanding Leveraged BTC Exposure
1:10:02 Oranje's World Cup Promotion
1:12:48 BitGo's Impact on Bitcoin Adoption

*рЯОЩпЄП Featured Guests:*
Sam Callahan вАФ Director of Bitcoin Strategy and Research, OranjeBTC.

Follow Sam at https://twitter.com/@samcallah

OranjeBTC: https://oranjebtc.com

Nick Payton вАФ VP of Marketing, BitGo.

Follow Nick at https://twitter.com/@NickDPayton

BitGo: https://bitgo.com

Alexandre Laizet вАФ Board Director of Bitcoin Strategy, Capital B.

Follow Alexandre at https://twitter.com/@AlexandreLaizet

Capital B: https://cptlb.com/

*рЯ§Э SUPPORT OUR SHOW:*
BitGo is the institutional-grade digital asset infrastructure trusted by thousands of institutions worldwide. A publicly traded company on the NYSE, BitGo offers regulated custody, OTC trading, financing, and settlement under one roof вАФ and holds a federally chartered national bank license from the OCC. Learn more at https://bit.ly/bitGo

COLDCARD is the industry-leading Bitcoin hardware wallet. Secure your Bitcoin at https://bit.ly/coinkiteStore вАФ use referral code 6BT to get 6% off at checkout!

Arch Lending offers the most transparent Bitcoin-backed borrowing experience in crypto вАФ industry-leading rates from 8.49%, qualified custody, no rehypothecation, and verifiable segregated addresses. Simple terms and public pricing at every size. Learn more at https://bit.ly/archlending

XCE Connecting Excellence Group is the UK's listed Bitcoin treasury recruitment company вАФ placing senior talent into Bitcoin companies globally and helping operating businesses build on a Bitcoin standard. Learn more at https://bit.ly/XCEio

Hemi вАФ Activate compliant Bitcoin yield without leaving custody. Follow them at https://twitter.com/@hemi_xyz and learn more at https://bit.ly/hemiXYZ

*рЯФЧ Resources:*
рЯФФ Follow Bitcoin Treasuries: https://twitter.com/@btctreasuries

рЯФФ Follow Tyler: https://twitter.com/@tylercompiler

рЯФФ Subscribe: https://youtube.com/@bitcointreasuriesnet

рЯУК Track every Bitcoin treasury company at https://bitcointreasuries.net

*рЯОђ About the Show:*
Bitcoin Treasuries with Tyler Rowe interviews executives, investors, and industry leaders navigating the Bitcoin treasury revolution.

*вЪ†пЄП Disclaimer:*
This podcast is for informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Always do your own research.

рЯЯ† Stay Orange.

]]>

item.title: Bitcoin Audible вАУ Chat_172 - Sovereign Devices in a Subscription World with Harald Sch√§fer
item.description:
"comma develops open source ADAS software. You can call it self-driving software, but currently what we ship is something where the user is supposed to pay attention all the time."

"We want the software to be open source so that people have full control. The hardware is something you have root on. We don't have any access to your device in terms of that's necessary to make it operate normally. There's some telemetry that you can turn off if you want. The device is something you buy, you run open source software on it and there's no cloud involved in making it work as an ADAS product."

***"We're pretty passionate about making sure that if you buy something you own it, if you run software, it should be open source and you should be able to modify it, or at least we shouldn't be able to stop you. That should be a thing that you control."

~ Harald Sch√§fer***

In this episode I talk with Harald Sch√§fer, CTO of comma(.)ai, about building sovereign driver-assist tech that runs locally on hardware you actually own. We dig into open-source ADAS, resisting the subscription and cloud-control model, how comma stayed sustainable without obtaining billions from VCs, and the real impact of modern AI on software development and robotics. We also get into the nerdy details of training self-driving models using a generative video simulator built from real-world driving data.

Chapters

(00:00:00) - Intro and why comma matters

(00:05:28) - Sovereign tech and DRM

(00:08:38) - Open-source ADAS and user control

(00:10:27) - YouвАЩll own nothing and be happy

(00:12:39) - AI, privacy and open source

(00:16:31) - HaraldвАЩs path into comma(.)ai

(00:21:27) - Car support and installs

(00:24:39) - Sustainable business vs VC

(00:34:01) - LLMs, coding and debt

(00:43:40) - Generative simulators for driving

(00:58:56) - In-person hardware engineering teams

(01:24:45) - Regulation and walled gardens

(01:30:26) - Final thoughts and how to try comma(.)ai

Guest Links

Harald on X (Link: https://x.com/___Harald___)

comma on X (Link: https://x.com/comma_ai)

comma's Website (Link: https://comma.ai/)

item.title: M√Љnzcrime - True Crime Bitcoin Podcast вАУ Unter Geldw√§scheverdacht Episode 6 (mit Plep4Fun)
item.description:
Konto gesperrt. Komplett. Kein √Ьberweisen, kein Abheben, kein gar nichts. Und das ohne Vorwarnung, ohne Erkl√§rung, einfach so. 


Genau das hat Pleb4Fun im Januar 2025 erwischt. Von einer Sekunde auf die andere war er raus aus dem System вАУ w√§hrend Rechnungen weiterhin kamen und das Leben sich nicht um sein Bankproblem scherte. 
Was dann folgte, war kein schneller Anruf mit happy ending. Es war ein b√Љrokratischer Alptraum, der eine viel unbequemere Frage aufwirft: Wie leicht ger√§t man heutzutage eigentlich ins Visier der Beh√ґrden, obwohl man absolut nichts falsch gemacht hat? 


Chefermittler Mavi hat sich mit Pleb4Fun zusammengesetzt und die ganze Geschichte auseinandergenommen вАУ akribisch, ehrlich und ohne Sch√ґnf√§rberei. Raus gekommen ist dabei eine Episode, die unter die Haut geht. Nicht weil sie rei√Яerisch ist, sondern weil es Realit√§t ist.


Geldw√§scheverdacht. Ein Begriff, den die meisten Menschen mit Kriminellen verbinden. Nicht mit jemandem, der einfach seinen Alltag lebt. 
Das hier ist keine abstrakte Diskussion √Љber Finanzgesetze. Das ist die Geschichte eines Menschen, der pl√ґtzlich beweisen musste, dass er kein Verbrecher ist вАУ und das Protokoll dazu liegt jetzt auf dem Tisch. 

Links zur Folge:
Pleb4Fun Dokumentation auf X

Ticketverkauf Event Brivat (Bitcoin Privacy Event)

Der Fall Samourai

crime21@getalby.com

https://x.com/Muenzcrime

muenzcrime@tuta.io]]>

item.title: State of Bitcoin with Brandon Keys вАУ The European Bitcoin Ban Hiding In Plain Sight with Matyas Kuchar - State of Bitcoin Ep. 238
item.description:
Until last year, more than 1,000 restaurants in Czech Republic accepted Bitcoin. Then it all stopped.

The MiCA regulation didn't ban Bitcoin in Europe. It did something far more effective вАФ it made the rails impossible to operate. And as the Czech merchant economy quietly disappeared, two bigger forces started moving in the background: the petrodollar dying, and CBDCs coming online in Europe THIS YEAR.

In this episode, I sit down with Matyas Kuchar вАФ co-founder of BTC Prague, the largest Bitcoin-only conference in Europe, and one of the most thoughtful voices on European Bitcoin policy вАФ to break down why Czech Republic became the Bitcoin capital of Europe, why the European surveillance state is spreading faster than Americans realize, and why he believes Bitcoin must win because the alternative is just so much worse.

You'll learn:

вЖТ How MiCA quietly killed 1,000+ Bitcoin-accepting restaurants in Czech Republic вАФ and why it wasn't even a direct ban

вЖТ Why Czech Republic became the Bitcoin capital of Europe (Trezor, Slush Pool, BIP-39, General Bytes вАФ all started in Prague)

вЖТ Why the petrodollar is dying вАФ and what the loss of US hegemony means for global decentralization

вЖТ Why Europeans use Bitcoin as money while Americans treat it as digital gold вАФ and which approach is right

вЖТ The European CBDC threat: pilots are launching THIS YEAR вАФ and why most Americans haven't heard about it

вЖТ The CBDC mechanism in Matyas's words: "You can analyze, you can control, you can surveil, you can send from a helicopter"

вЖТ Why even an anarcho-capitalist now meets with politicians вАФ and what changed his mind

вЖТ Why Bitcoin is no longer just savings вАФ it's the network of people building the future you actually want to live in

рЯЪ® JOIN ME AT BTC PRAGUE 2026

The largest Bitcoin-only conference in Europe вАФ June 11-13. Use code GREENCANDLE for discounted tickets:

https://btcprague.com/

рЯОѓ PROTECT YOUR BITCOIN WITH SALT LENDING

Borrow against your Bitcoin without selling a single sat. Green Candle viewers get an exclusive offer:

https://saltlending.com/green-candle

рЯОѓ PLAN YOUR WEALTH WITH STRONG WEALTH

Build a Bitcoin-aligned wealth strategy вАФ estate planning, tax optimization, portfolio construction:

https://strongwealth.net/

рЯОѓ MINE BITCOIN WITH SIMPLE MINING

First-year repairs free for Green Candle listeners:

https://simplemining.io/green-candle

рЯУК REFERENCED IN THIS EPISODE

вАҐ MiCA regulation (EU 2023/1114) вАФ Markets in Crypto-Assets framework

вАҐ Czech Republic Bitcoin tax exemption (3-year hold rule)

вАҐ Slush Pool (founded 2010 in Prague, first ever Bitcoin mining pool)

вАҐ BIP-39 seed phrase standard (developed in Prague)

вАҐ Trezor hardware wallet (first ever, founded in Prague)

вАҐ EU CBDC pilot programs (launching 2026)

вАҐ BTC Prague 2026 conference вАФ June 11-13

Bitcoin #BTCPrague #Matyas #MiCA #BitcoinEurope #CBDC #BitcoinPolicy #EuropeanBitcoin #BitcoinConference #SoundMoney #Petrodollar #BitcoinAdoption #CzechRepublic #FinancialFreedom #BitcoinNews

рЯФФ SUBSCRIBE for weekly Bitcoin, macro, and personal finance content.

вЪ†пЄП Disclaimer: This video is for informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Always do your own research.

]]>

item.title: BitBucks Bitcoin Podcast вАУ Bitcoin und Deutschland: Wo stehen wir und wo kann die Reise hingehen? #6 mit Larry
item.description:
Herzlich willkommen zum BitBucks Bitcoin Podcast(https://www.bitbucks.de)!

Heute haben wir einen besonderen Gast: Larry, bekannt als @B1tcoin3r auf X. Larry ist ein erfahrener Bitcoin-Experte, Vortragsredner und Workshop-Host. Dank seines weitreichenden Netzwerks in f√Љhrenden Positionen bringt er tiefgehende Einblicke in die aktuelle Bitcoin-Situation in Deutschland mit. Gemeinsam sprechen wir √Љber die deutsche Bitcoin-Politik, die Auswirkungen der neuen Regierung und die m√ґgliche Zukunft von Bitcoin in Deutschland.

Viel Spa√Я beim Zuh√ґren!

Zudem reden wir auch noch √Љber die Themen:

- Die aktuelle Bitcoin Lage in Deutschland (Adaption, Beliebtheit)

- L√ґsungen f√Љr eine Bitcoin Adaption

- Einfluss der Politik auf Bitcoin

- Ob Bitcoin die Politik √Љberhaupt braucht- Bitcoin und Unternehmen bzw. Start-Ups

- Wie viele Jahre es dauern wird, bis Deutschland Bitcoin als offizielles Zahlungsmittel einf√Љhrt

- Bitcoin St√§dte Spiel: Errate die f√Љnf beliebtesten Bitcoin St√§dte weltweit

- Wie Bitcoin Larrys Leben ver√§ndert hat

item.title: Bitcoin Bundesverband Podcast вАУ #2 Vorstandsvorstellung
item.description:
Am 26. September 2024 wurde der вБ†Bitcoin BundesverbandвБ† offiziell gegr√Љndet, und der erste Vorstand wurde gew√§hlt. Zum Vorstandsvorsitzenden wurde Philipp Hartmannsgruber ernannt, sein Stellvertreter ist Daniel Wingen, und Matthias Steger √Љbernimmt das Amt des Finanzvorstands. Weitere Vorstandsmitglieder sind Evelyn Brock, Jens Leinert, Dr. Mathias Linkerhand und Lars Eichhorst. In dieser Folge stellt sich das Team vor.

item.title: Bitcoin Insights | Bitcoin Podcast mit Philipp 'PJAH' Hartmannsgruber вАУ #16 Im Auto nach El Zonte: Bitcoin in El Salvador mit Robin Seyr und Ben Raich
item.description:
In dieser Episode spricht Philipp mit Robin Seyr und Ben Raich im Auto auf dem Weg von San Salvador nach El Zonte √Љber ihre Eindr√Љcke aus El Salvador. Sie diskutieren die Bitcoin-Adoption, die Adopting Bitcoin-Konferenz, die Sicherheitslage, die allt√§gliche Nutzung von Bitcoin und die politische Situation unter Pr√§sident Bukele.


Wer ist Robin Seyr?

Robin Seyr ist Host vom t√§glichen Bitcoin Podcast.


Wer ist Ben Raich?

Ben Raich arbeitet mit Leidenschaft an vielf√§ltigen Projekten im Bitcoin-Space, um Bildung und Adaption von Bitcoin voranzutreiben. Sein Schwerpunkt liegt auf der Produktion hochwertiger Videopodcasts, dem Videoschnitt sowie journalistischen T√§tigkeiten.

item.title: Bitcoin.com News Weekly Update вАУ Bitcoin Bear Market, ETH Cuts and World Cup Crypto Betting
item.description: <![CDATA[Is Bitcoin still in a bear market?In this episode of **The Weekly**, David Sencil and Graham Stone break down Bitcoin's prolonged move below its 200-day moving average, accelerating spot Bitcoin ETF outflows, and why Strategy's STRC structure continues to weigh on market sentiment.They also discuss the Ethereum Foundation's restructuring, the launch of Eth Labs, USDT briefly surpassing ETH by market cap, evolving stablecoin regulation, and how the 2026 FIFA World Cup is driving a surge in crypto-based prediction markets and sports betting.Whether you're following Bitcoin, Ethereum, stablecoins, macro trends, or crypto adoption, this episode covers the biggest stories shaping the market this week.рЯОІ Follow *The Weekly* on Spotify and turn on notifications so you never miss new episodes.Chapters:00:47 - Welcome back and episode overview01:23 - Bitcoin bear market and ETF outflows03:44 - BlackRock iBit and broader ETF pressure05:00 - Macro headwinds and Fed rate expectations07:41 - Bitcoin valuation and the power law mean08:17 - Dollar strength and Michael Saylor09:27 - Strategy, STRC, and dividend questions13:45 - Market skepticism and STRCвАЩs peg16:48 - Why some are turning constructive on MSTR17:27 - Ethereum Foundation restructuring19:25 - ETH Labs and EthereumвАЩs business focus22:48 - Stablecoins and USDT overtaking Ether24:16 - Bank of England backtracks on stablecoin limits26:08 - World Cup betting and crypto adoption31:11 - Bitcoin.com app and wrap-up]]>

item.title: Epicenter - Learn about Crypto, Blockchain, Ethereum, Bitcoin and Distributed Technologies вАУ Why Only 3 Builders Control All of Ethereum
item.description:
In this episode, host Friederike Ernst is joined by Kubi Mensah, CEO and co-founder of Gattaca, the company behind Titan Builder. Kubi sheds light on the highly competitive and often opaque world of Ethereum block building, explaining how Gattaca evolved from a centralized exchange proprietary trading firm to one of the three dominant builders responsible for constructing the vast majority of Ethereum blocks today .
¬†



¬†
They dissect the true "journey of a transaction," revealing why over half of all Ethereum transaction value bypasses the public mempool in favor of private order flow auctions and MEV-protection services . Kubi explains the intricate mechanics of top-of-block bidding by high-frequency DeFi arbitrageurs, the necessity of extreme latency optimization, and the "flywheel effect" that makes block building a natural oligopoly . Finally, the discussion turns to the future of the Ethereum roadmap, unpacking how upcoming upgrades like ePBS (enshrined Proposer-Builder Separation) and FOCIL (Fork-Choice Enforced Inclusion Lists) aim to permanently alter the power dynamics between block builders, validators, and originators .
¬†
¬†
Topics


  • 04:15 Transitioning from TradFi Trading to Ethereum Block Building
  • 09:30 Redefining the Builder: Relays and Order Flow Auctions
  • 15:00 Unpacking the Mempool: Public vs. Private Transactions
  • 21:45 The Anatomy of a Block & "Top-of-Block" Arbitrage
  • 27:10 How Builders Pay Proposers to Win Auctions
  • 35:20 The Oligopoly: Why Only 3 Builders Dominate Ethereum
  • 42:15 Trust in the Dark Forest: Handling Searcher Bundles
  • 49:00 The Convergence of Builders and Solvers
  • 55:30 The Impact of ePBS, FOCIL, and Pre-confirmations




Sponsors:



Lido V3 introduces stVaults: a modular staking infrastructure that lets builders and institutions deploy custom staking vaults, while staying anchored to stETH as a shared liquidity layer.Get started building with Lido V3 today: https://lido.fi/stvaults?mtm_campaign=epicenterBlock Space Forum: https://blockspace.forum/

]]>

item.description:
Leon Wankum ist der Head of Bitcoin Strategies bei oneVest, einem Familienunternehmen mit Fokus auf Immobilienentwicklung und Investments. Leon ist jedoch auch aktiv in der Bitcoin-Community und ist regelm√§ssig in Podcasts zu h√ґren oder schreibt seinen eigenen Newsletter. Nun hat er auch sein eigenes Bitcoin-Buch ver√ґffentlicht.

Im Gespr√§ch mit Relai-CEO Julian Liniger erz√§hlt Leon von seiner Motivation, ein Bitcoin-Buch zu schreiben, weshalb ihn Bitcoin nach √Љber 10 Jahren immer noch so motiviert, wie er die Lage rund um Bitcoin auf der Bilanz sieht, und wohin Bitcoin in den kommenden Jahren noch gehen wird.

item.title: Krypto Corner вАУ Bitcoin, ETF und NFT: Sicher investieren - Krypto verstehen und sicher starten вАУ Kapitel3: Bitcoin kaufen f√Љr Anf√§nger ohne Abzocke | Buch Kapitel 3
item.description:
Willkommen zur√Љck zu einer neuen Podcast-Folge! рЯОЩпЄП

Episode #3: Dein erster Krypto-Kauf!¬†рЯЪА

In der Krypto Corner geht es heute ans Eingemachte. Unsere Berliner WG hat die Theorie verstanden, jetzt wird es praktisch. Aber wo kauft man eigentlich Bitcoin, ohne direkt √Љber den Tisch gezogen zu werden? Wir schauen uns Kapitel 3 meines Buchs вАЮKrypto verstehen вАУ sicher starten (Band 1)вАЬ an. Julian und Sophie wollen investieren, doch sie sto√Яen auf Betr√Љger-Websites, Identit√§tspr√Љfungen (KYC) und fiese Geb√Љhrenfallen der B√ґrsen.

Lerne in dieser Folge, wie du seri√ґse Plattformen erkennst, warum du keinen ganzen Bitcoin kaufen musst (Hallo, Satoshis!) und wie du mit der "Trading-Ansicht" bares Geld bei den Geb√Љhren sparst.


рЯУЪ¬†Das Buch zur Show:¬†Hol dir das Buch zur Folge: вАЮKrypto verstehen вАУ sicher starten. Band 1вАЬ von Sascha Swen Heiter. Wenn du das gesamte Wissen sofort anwenden m√ґchtest вАУ von der Einrichtung deiner Hardware Wallets √Љber die Nutzung von Burner Wallets bis hin zu wichtigen rechtlichen und steuerlichen Themen in der DACH-Region вАУ hol dir das komplette Buch! рЯСЙ¬†https://amzn.eu/d/06DuLLUw

рЯОІ¬†Krypto Corner Podcast:¬†H√ґrst du diese Folge gerade auf YouTube? Du findest den¬†Krypto Corner¬†Podcast auch auf Spotify, Apple Podcasts und √Љberall sonst, f√Љr regelm√§√Яige Deep-Dives und Sicherheits-Updates f√Љr unterwegs!

рЯСЗ¬†Unterst√Љtze den Kanal:¬†Wenn dir diese Folge geholfen hat, lass ein Abo da, gib dem Video einen Daumen nach oben und aktiviere die Glocke. Fragen oder Anmerkungen zum dritten Kapitel? Ab damit in die Kommentare!

вЪЦпЄП¬†Rechtliche Hinweise / Haftungsausschluss:¬†Die in diesem Podcast geteilten Inhalte dienen ausschlie√Яlich der allgemeinen Information sowie der Unterhaltung und stellen¬†keine Anlage-, Rechts- oder Steuerberatung¬†dar. Investitionen in Kryptow√§hrungen sind hochriskant und k√ґnnen zu einem Totalverlust des eingesetzten Kapitals f√Љhren. Jeder H√ґrer und Zuschauer handelt absolut eigenverantwortlich. Besonders bei steuerlichen Themen ist zu beachten, dass die steuerliche Behandlung von Kryptow√§hrungen sehr komplex ist. Bitte konsultiere f√Љr die aktuell geltende Rechtslage in der DACH-Region zwingend einen qualifizierten Steuerberater. Eine Haftung f√Љr Sch√§den, die aus der Nutzung der hier bereitgestellten Informationen entstehen, wird ausdr√Љcklich ausgeschlossen.

#Podcast #KryptoCorner #BitcoinKaufen #Krypto #KryptoVerstehen #KryptoAnf√§nger #Finanzwissen #Blockchain #KryptoB√ґrse #Kapitel3


]]>

Wenn du das gesamte Wissen sofort anwenden m√ґchtest вАУ von der Einrichtung deiner Hardware Wallets √Љber die Nutzung von Burner Wallets bis hin zu wichtigen rechtlichen und steuerlichen Themen in der DACH-Region вАУ hol dir das komplette Buch! рЯСЙ¬†https://amzn.eu/d/06DuLLUw

рЯОІ¬†Krypto Corner Podcast:¬†H√ґrst du diese Folge gerade auf YouTube? Du findest den¬†Krypto Corner¬†Podcast auch auf Spotify, Apple Podcasts und √Љberall sonst, f√Љr regelm√§√Яige Deep-Dives und Sicherheits-Updates f√Љr unterwegs!

рЯСЗ¬†Unterst√Љtze den Kanal:¬†Wenn dir diese Folge geholfen hat, lass ein Abo da, gib dem Video einen Daumen nach oben und aktiviere die Glocke. Fragen oder Anmerkungen zum dritten Kapitel? Ab damit in die Kommentare!

вЪЦпЄП¬†Rechtliche Hinweise / Haftungsausschluss:¬†Die in diesem Podcast geteilten Inhalte dienen ausschlie√Яlich der allgemeinen Information sowie der Unterhaltung und stellen¬†keine Anlage-, Rechts- oder Steuerberatung¬†dar. Investitionen in Kryptow√§hrungen sind hochriskant und k√ґnnen zu einem Totalverlust des eingesetzten Kapitals f√Љhren. Jeder H√ґrer und Zuschauer handelt absolut eigenverantwortlich. Besonders bei steuerlichen Themen ist zu beachten, dass die steuerliche Behandlung von Kryptow√§hrungen sehr komplex ist. Bitte konsultiere f√Љr die aktuell geltende Rechtslage in der DACH-Region zwingend einen qualifizierten Steuerberater. Eine Haftung f√Љr Sch√§den, die aus der Nutzung der hier bereitgestellten Informationen entstehen, wird ausdr√Љcklich ausgeschlossen.

item.title: Bitcoin.com News Interviews вАУ Erik Voorhees on AI Freedom, Bitcoin & Why Crypto Principles Still Matter
item.description: <![CDATA[Has AI replaced crypto as the most important technology storyвАФor is it making crypto more important than ever?In this episode, Venice.AI founder Erik Voorhees joins Bitcoin.com's David Sencil to explore the intersection of artificial intelligence, Bitcoin, privacy, and permissionless technology.Voorhees explains why AI has captured the spotlight, why Bitcoin's core principles remain essential, and how private, open-source AI could shape the future of digital freedom. The conversation also covers censorship, free speech, Venice.AI's token model, and why decentralized AI training may become one of crypto's biggest long-term opportunities.Topics include:- Why AI has overshadowed crypto- Why Bitcoin's principles still matter- Open-source vs. closed AI- Private and uncensored AI- AI regulation and free speech- Venice.AI's token model- Crypto powering AI applications- Decentralized AI model trainingрЯОІ Enjoyed this episode? Follow the Bitcoin.com Podcast on Spotify for more conversations with the builders, founders, and policymakers shaping the future of Bitcoin, crypto, AI, and digital finance.Chapters:00:00 The Intersection of Bitcoin and AI09:32 The Role of Institutions in Bitcoin's Future13:47 AI: Accelerationism vs. Dystopia14:16 Ethics and Responsibility in AI Development22:34 Open Source AI Models: A Comparative Analysis25:45 Understanding AI Model Differences28:17 The Race for AI Intelligence: US vs China33:20 Venice: An AI Company with Crypto Elements36:56 Privacy and Trust in AI: Venice's Approach42:22 The Role of Tokens in Venice's Ecosystem51:15 Future of Crypto and AI: Decentralized Model Training]]>

item.title: Surfin' Bitcoin вАУ La crypto a √©chou√©. Bitcoin risque-t-il de faire la m√™me erreur ? (avec Dark Emi)
item.description:
La crypto a-t-elle √©chou√© ? ICO, NFT, m√©taverse, altcoinsвА¶ En 15 ans, des milliards ont √©t√© lev√©s, et l'√©crasante majorit√© s'est transform√©e en pi√®ges √† retail. Et pourtant, un seul actif a surv√©cu √† tous les cycles : Bitcoin.


Dans cet √©pisode de Surfin' Bitcoin, on re√Іoit √Йmilien Dutang, alias Dark_Emi, OG crypto depuis 2011 et fondateur de nodz.io, pour faire le bilan sans filtre de ces 15 derni√®res ann√©es.


Un d√©bat franc entre un maxi et un anti-maxi, qui se rejoignent sur un constat : l'√©cosyst√®me a fait beaucoup de mal, mais Bitcoin pourrait bien √™tre la seule chose qui en sort grandie.


вЮ§ Pourquoi 99% des ICO ont-elles √©t√© un pi√®ge pour les particuliers ?

вЮ§ Comment fonctionnait vraiment le business model des influenceurs crypto ?

вЮ§ Bitcoin risque-t-il de faire la m√™me erreur que la crypto ?

вЮ§ Quel est le vrai risque pour Bitcoin : le quantique ou le politique ?

item.title: Bitcoin Rails | Isabel Foxen Duke вАУ Not Your Keys, Not Your AI | ERIK CASON & JESSE POSNER
item.description:
As language models evolve into extensions of memory, judgment, and decision-makingвАФquestions of ownership, privacy, and autonomy become increasingly difficult to ignore.

In this interview, Vora founders Erik Cason and Jesse Posner share why the future of AI will look very different depending on our ability to do one thing: maintain self-custody of our personal dataвАФwith private keys, just like Bitcoin.

A conversation about who controls the systems shaping human cognition, and how we can protect ourselves with the same ethos we protect our BitcoinвАФthis interview covers:

  • Why AI is the most intimate technology ever created + the specific risks of centralized AI systems controlling sensitive personal information
  • How Bitcoin's self-custody model provides a framework for thinking about data ownership in the AI age (Not Your Keys, Not Your Mind)
  • Why data sovereignty may become one of the defining technological and political questions of the coming decades
  • How you can protect yourself and your personal information from centralized AI risksвАФincluding data leaks, political manipulation and more.

This episode of Bitcoin Rails is brought to you by my sponsors:

LayerTwo Labs вАФ developing research, software, and technologies for scaling Bitcoin via the integration of Drivechains (BIP 300/301)

Hashi on Sui Network вАФ a primitive for executing Bitcoin DeFi transactions, without having to trust a federated bridge or other centralized entity

BitBox вАФ an open-source Bitcoin-only hardware wallet, with smooth UX and no compromises on security. Check out Bitbox [dot] swiss and use code BITCOINRAILS to get a discount

]]>

item.title: Bitcoin Audible вАУ Chat_172 - Sovereign Devices in a Subscription World with Harald Sch√§fer
item.description:
"comma develops open source ADAS software. You can call it self-driving software, but currently what we ship is something where the user is supposed to pay attention all the time."

"We want the software to be open source so that people have full control. The hardware is something you have root on. We don't have any access to your device in terms of that's necessary to make it operate normally. There's some telemetry that you can turn off if you want. The device is something you buy, you run open source software on it and there's no cloud involved in making it work as an ADAS product."

***"We're pretty passionate about making sure that if you buy something you own it, if you run software, it should be open source and you should be able to modify it, or at least we shouldn't be able to stop you. That should be a thing that you control."

~ Harald Sch√§fer***

In this episode I talk with Harald Sch√§fer, CTO of comma(.)ai, about building sovereign driver-assist tech that runs locally on hardware you actually own. We dig into open-source ADAS, resisting the subscription and cloud-control model, how comma stayed sustainable without obtaining billions from VCs, and the real impact of modern AI on software development and robotics. We also get into the nerdy details of training self-driving models using a generative video simulator built from real-world driving data.

(00:05:28) - Sovereign tech and DRM
